payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: White painted wooden mantel with rectangular recessed panels and decorative trim surrounding a dark charcoal/black fireplace insert and empty firebox; the right side and top are slightly edge-cropped and the foreground shows tabletop objects partially obscuring the lower corner — approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"fireplace","short_description":"white wooden mantel, dark insert","long_description":"White painted wooden mantel with rectangular recessed panels and decorative trim surrounding a dark charcoal/black fireplace insert and empty firebox; the right side and top are slightly edge-cropped and the foreground shows tabletop objects partially obscuring the lower corner — approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.","attributes":["white painted wood","rectangular recessed panels","decorative trim/molding","dark charcoal/black insert","empty/black firebox","foreground tabletop objects","right-side edge-cropped","mantel shelf visible"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
